# SpotsLabs_

> Last Updated: 2026-05-29

## Organization

SpotsLabs is a next-generation technology studio headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey. It transforms innovative ideas into end-to-end digital ecosystems. The company simplifies complex business processes with flawless architectures, eliminating time losses, chaos, and hidden software costs caused by cumbersome systems.

- **URL:** https://spotslabs.com
- **Legal Name:** SpotsLabs Bilişim Teknolojileri A.Ş.
- **Type:** Technology Studio / Software Agency
- **Location:** Istanbul, Turkey
- **Languages:** Turkish (tr), English (en)
- **Contact:** info@spotslabs.com

## Products

### GateOS
GateOS is SpotsLabs' flagship product — a next-generation business operating system that unifies disconnected software (website, CRM, accounting, social media) into a single AI-powered central dashboard. It serves multiple sectors including Legal and HoReCa (Hotels, Restaurants, Cafés).

#### GateOS Modules
- **WEB (CMS):** Block-based website content management system. No coding required.
- **CRM:** Customer relationship management and sales pipeline tracking.
- **Social:** Centralized social media and community communication hub.
- **mind: (AI):** Autonomous AI engine managing the entire ecosystem — content generation, SEO optimization, and brand voice management. Powered by Google Gemini.
- **Finance:** Pre-accounting, invoicing, and cash flow tracking.
- **Calendar:** Appointment and time management.

## Sector Solutions

### GateOS for Law Firms (Lex)
A digital operating system for modern law firms. Covers website management, legal article publishing, client relations (CRM), case tracking, contract preparation, and social media — all under data-isolated security architecture.
- **Page:** https://spotslabs.com/en/sectors/law

### GateOS for HoReCa
An end-to-end operating system for restaurants and cafés. Covers website, social media, marketplace order aggregation, pre-accounting, kitchen display system (KDS), and courier/delivery operations — powered by AI and real-time event-driven architecture.
- **Page:** https://spotslabs.com/en/sectors/horeca

## Structured Data
Every page on this site contains a JSON-LD @graph with linked entities (Organization, WebSite, WebPage, Person, Article, SoftwareApplication). These provide definitive entity definitions for AI consumption.
